title: Johnny and Yosaku Cross Paths With the Crew
description: On pages 15–18, the Straw Hats settle into life aboard their new ship, raise their pirate flag, and meet Johnny and Yosaku on the way toward a cook.
scene: The crew’s mood is lighter after Syrup Village, but practical problems quickly appear: they need roles, supplies, medical help, and eventually a cook.

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: The name's Johnny!

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: And I'm YOSAKU!

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: Bounty Hunter duo, "YOSAKU and Johnny"

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: Zoro used to bounty Hunt with us in the past!

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you all!

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: I don't know how to thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: I thought I bit the dust for sure.

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: Well, colour me surprised! I never would've expected the infamous pirate Hunter Zoro

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to have become a pirate himself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BUBEE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BlARGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: YOSAKU!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just shut up and get some rest already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let this be a lesson to the rest of you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: These are the kinds of dangers we'll have to face on long voyages.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He would've died for sure if he hadn't come across us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We definitely need someone to think about our diet to see to it that we stay healthy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: what we need is a "chef of the sea."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you think about it, that's one of the most important talents to have when you're out on the seas.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright, I've decided then! Let's go look for a sea cook!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eating Good Food is NEVER A BAD THING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What is it, Johnny?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you're looking for a cook, I know just the place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course, getting one to join you is another matter altogether...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A restaurant on the seas!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right. You should be able to reach it from here in 2-3 days.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But that place is close to the grand line so you gotta be careful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Lotta dangerous guys around those parts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even that "Hawk- eyed man",

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've been looking for has been sighted there once before.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If it's alright with you, I'll lead the way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright!

summary: This part acts as a bridge from Syrup Village to Baratie, giving Usopp a place on the crew and steering the story toward Sanji’s introduction.
